items.headline: China fireworks factory explosion kills 26 workers in Hunan Province
items.body: An explosion at a fireworks facility in Liuyang killed 26 and injured 61 on May 5. All fireworks manufacturers in the city have been ordered to halt production pending investigation.

items.headline: Romania coalition government collapses after no-confidence vote
items.body: Parliament removed Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan with 281 votes on May 6. Markets fell on concern the political crisis threatens deficit reduction pledges to Brussels.

items.headline: Trump pauses Strait of Hormuz operation one day after launch
items.body: The U.S. halted ship escort operations on May 6 citing progress toward Iran agreement. Six Iranian boats were sunk during the single day of military confrontation.

items.headline: Philippines declares national energy emergency as gasoline prices double
items.body: The government invoked emergency powers after fuel costs surged past previous highs. Indonesia and Vietnam have begun energy rationing in response to the regional supply shock.
